title: dichelachne novoguineensis
intro: Dichelachne novoguineensis, also known as the Guinea grass, is a species of grass native to New Guinea. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dichelachne novoguineensis include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a valuable remedy in local folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Dichelachne novoguineensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying the plant's extract topically to affected areas.
